features: SIGNATURE SCENT - Our Original scent will leave you feeling fresh and invigorated all day long. Packed with fresh citrus notes of apple and lemon, that combine with bergamot and sandalwood, helping you start every day the Rock Face way.
FAST ABSORBING - Leaving no stains, our Original body spray leaves you feeling fresh and ready to take on your day with long-lasting protection.
PIONEERING FORMULA - Hard-working and great-smelling pioneering formulas, backed by science. All our products are vegan-friendly, never tested on animals and free from micro-beads and parabens.
BUILT FOR ACTIVE LIFESTYLES - Designed for those with an active lifestyle in mind, this body spray deodorant is gentle on the skin with a long-lasting fragrance.

ROCK FACE - As a proudly independent British Brand and a team that has spent a lifetime in the industry, we wanted to deliver the highest quality formulas for men, at the most affordable price. There are real faces behind this brand.
